indicators.name: no bed or resting surface
indicators.rationale: The absence of a bed or any resting surface makes this space unsuitable for sleep.

indicators.name: no furniture or personal items
indicators.rationale: The lack of furniture or personal items suggests this is not a living space suitable for sleep.

indicators.name: no windows or curtains
indicators.rationale: No windows or curtains make it impossible to control light and noise, key factors for sleep.

indicators.name: no acoustic enclosure
indicators.rationale: The open layout and lack of walls make it difficult to achieve a quiet environment.

reasoning_summary: This scene lacks the basic components necessary for sleep, such as a bed or resting surface, and has no windows or curtains to control light and noise. The open layout and lack of acoustic enclosure make it unsuitable for sleep.
